{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Lichborn wizards
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A circle of [[Lichborn wizards]] worked out a counterspell for the narrator's magic.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
